summary: REQ-1 (add tweetnacl as a frontend dependency via package manifest/lockfile) is not evidenced in the provided diff summary. The diff shows an added TS smoke-test utility and updates to summary/state files, but no package.json or lockfile changes. There are also extra/unrequested changes (e.g., a tweetnacl smoke test file and project state notes about changing Ed25519 keygen, which is explicitly a non-goal).

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the `tweetnacl` npm package as a dependency in the frontend project (update the frontend package manifest and lockfile as applicable) so frontend TypeScript code can import it.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not show any changes to the frontend package manifest (e.g., package.json) or any lockfile, which are required to actually add an npm dependency. Only a new TS utility file and documentation/state-like files are shown.
evidence: <file-diff>: MODIFIED FILES list does not include frontend/package.json or any lockfile
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts (added, but dependency addition not shown)

hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 only asks to add the npm dependency (manifest + lockfile). Adding a new source file is not requested by the BuildRequest (though it may be intended to validate the import).
